category_sources: source_facts.description describes wuchale as protobuf-like i18n from plain code; official site describes compile-time i18n.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives wuchale; official site branding uses wuchale.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official wuchale site with dedicated docs; official GitHub README points to the Getting Started guide.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official wuchale site links to the wuchalejs/wuchale GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says i18n from plain code; official site describes extraction, translation, catalogs, and framework support.
